---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement
title: "[feat] "
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem

What problem are you trying to solve? What is the use case?

## Proposed solution

What you would like to see. Sketch the behavior, the config, or the API surface
if you have one in mind.

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you thought about and why you set them aside.

## Additional context

Links, prior art, or related issues.
